subcodes.first_line: O 'Alí-Qablí-Akbar! The oppressor of the earth hath sought to extinguish the Light, and hath wrought that which from time immemorial [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا علی قبل اکبر ظالم ارض یا قصد اطفای نور نموده و عمل کرده آنچه را که از اول
subcodes.subjects: @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @suffering and imprisonment, @martyrs and martyrdom
